  "description": "Banseke Production Limited, a company&nbsp;into water production, is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location:&nbsp;Olorunsogo, Eruwo, Ijebu-ode - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties


	Cash Handling and POS systems operation
	Customer service and good communicaton
	Account balancing/ reconciliation
	Microsoft Tool (MsWord, Excel ad Oulook).


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND qualification.
	Payment remittance
	High level of intrgrity, detail-oriented and reliable
	Lives nearby or within communiting distance.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;bansekenterprises@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Cashier Job at Banseke Production Limited




        
    

        
        Banseke Production Limited, a company into water production, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Olorunsogo, Eruwo, Ijebu-ode - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties


	Cash Handling and POS systems operation
	Customer service and good communicaton
	Account balancing/ reconciliation
	Microsoft Tool (MsWord, Excel ad Oulook).


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess an OND qualification.
	Payment remittance
	High level of intrgrity, detail-oriented and reliable
	Lives nearby or within communiting distance.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Jeroid Limited is a leading Nigerian fintech company offering innovative solutions in cryptocurrency trading, gift card redemption, and digital payments. With a user base of over 200,000, we are committed to delivering secure, fast, and reliable services. At Jeroid, we value exceptional customer experiences and are seeking a dedicated Customer Service Representative to join our growing team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a Customer Service &amp; Support Representative who will be the first point of contact for our customers, ensuring that inquiries, complaints, and requests are handled with professionalism, empathy, and efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Respond promptly to customer inquiries via live chat, email, WhatsApp, and other assigned channels.
	Provide accurate information about our products, services, and transaction processes.
	Investigate and resolve complaints while ensuring minimal disruption to customer experience.
	Escalate complex issues to relevant teams and follow up until resolution.
	Maintain accurate customer records and interaction logs.
	Collaborate with internal teams (tech, compliance, finance) to ensure customer satisfaction.
	Monitor transactions and provide timely updates to customers.
	Identify recurring customer issues and suggest process improvements.
	Ensure adherence to company policies, procedures, and compliance guidelines.
	Assist in onboarding new customers and guiding them through platform use.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an OND/HND/BSc in any field.
	At least 2 years of experience in customer service, preferably in fintech or e-commerce.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong problem-solving ability and attention to detail.
	Good typing speed and proficiency with digital tools (Google Workspace, CRM systems, live chat software).
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.
	Willingness to work shifts, including evenings, weekends, and holidays.


Skills &amp; Attributes:


	Empathetic, patient, and customer-focused.
	Proactive in finding solutions and following through.
	Ability to remain calm under pressure.
	Professional and positive attitude.
	Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;Vacancy@jeroid.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-20",

  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

Customer Service Representative Job at Jeroid Limited




        
    

        
        Jeroid Limited is a leading Nigerian fintech company offering innovative solutions in cryptocurrency trading, gift card redemption, and digital payments. With a user base of over 200,000, we are committed to delivering secure, fast, and reliable services. At Jeroid, we value exceptional customer experiences and are seeking a dedicated Customer Service Representative to join our growing team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a Customer Service & Support Representative who will be the first point of contact for our customers, ensuring that inquiries, complaints, and requests are handled with professionalism, empathy, and efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Respond promptly to customer inquiries via live chat, email, WhatsApp, and other assigned channels.
	Provide accurate information about our products, services, and transaction processes.
	Investigate and resolve complaints while ensuring minimal disruption to customer experience.
	Escalate complex issues to relevant teams and follow up until resolution.
	Maintain accurate customer records and interaction logs.
	Collaborate with internal teams (tech, compliance, finance) to ensure customer satisfaction.
	Monitor transactions and provide timely updates to customers.
	Identify recurring customer issues and suggest process improvements.
	Ensure adherence to company policies, procedures, and compliance guidelines.
	Assist in onboarding new customers and guiding them through platform use.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an OND/HND/BSc in any field.
	At least 2 years of experience in customer service, preferably in fintech or e-commerce.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong problem-solving ability and attention to detail.
	Good typing speed and proficiency with digital tools (Google Workspace, CRM systems, live chat software).
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.
	Willingness to work shifts, including evenings, weekends, and holidays.


Skills & Attributes:


	Empathetic, patient, and customer-focused.
	Proactive in finding solutions and following through.
	Ability to remain calm under pressure.
	Professional and positive attitude.
	Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Management Analyst / Associate",
  "description": "Tetra Maritime is a leading Nigerian ship owner and operator, providing comprehensive and tailor-made solutions across the oil and gas supply chain, including upstream, midstream, and downstream.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Business Management Analyst / Associate

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Description


	We are seeking a dynamic Business Management professional to support executive operations and strategic initiatives.
	This role is ideal for an ambitious early-career professional with exceptional organization, process-management, and problem-solving skills, paired with excellent attention to detail and communication abilities.
	You will work closely with senior leadership, contributing to high-level decision-making, operational efficiency, and cross-functional projects, providing analytical and operational support to executive leadership.&nbsp;


Roles and&nbsp;Responsibilities

Flexibility, agility, and responsiveness to fast-paced and demanding executive itineraries is key.&nbsp;
	Reporting &amp; Communication:&nbsp;Prepare high-quality reports, presentations, and communications for internal and external stakeholders.&nbsp;
	Process Optimization:&nbsp;Manage and improve business processes to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.&nbsp;
	Project Coordination:&nbsp;Coordinate cross-functional projects and ensure timely delivery of outcomes.&nbsp;


Requirements


	Education:&nbsp;Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Law, Finance, or&nbsp;any field that&nbsp;demonstrates&nbsp;strong analytical and organizational capabilities.&nbsp;
	Experience:&nbsp;1 - 3 years of relevant experience in a fast-paced, professional environment (e.g., consulting, finance, legal, corporate operations, or equivalent high-pressure roles).&nbsp;
	We value diverse academic backgrounds and perspectives.&nbsp;


Skills:


	Exceptional organizational and&nbsp;process-management&nbsp;skills.&nbsp;
	Strong problem-solving abilities and analytical thinking.&nbsp;
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.&nbsp;
	High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple priorities.&nbsp;

Business Management Analyst / Associate Job at Tetra Maritime




        
    

        
        Tetra Maritime is a leading Nigerian ship owner and operator, providing comprehensive and tailor-made solutions across the oil and gas supply chain, including upstream, midstream, and downstream.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Management Analyst / Associate

Job Location: Lagos

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dynamic Business Management professional to support executive operations and strategic initiatives.
	This role is ideal for an ambitious early-career professional with exceptional organization, process-management, and problem-solving skills, paired with excellent attention to detail and communication abilities.
	You will work closely with senior leadership, contributing to high-level decision-making, operational efficiency, and cross-functional projects, providing analytical and operational support to executive leadership. 


Roles and Responsibilities


	Executive Support: The crucial core function is the provision of high-class operational support to executive leadership—at the top of the global organization, including the C-suite—across the full spectrum of executive activities: meeting planning and management, external engagements, project management, communications, and more. Flexibility, agility, and responsiveness to fast-paced and demanding executive itineraries is key. 
	Reporting & Communication: Prepare high-quality reports, presentations, and communications for internal and external stakeholders. 
	Process Optimization: Manage and improve business processes to enhance efficiency and effectiveness. 
	Project Coordination: Coordinate cross-functional projects and ensure timely delivery of outcomes. 


Requirements


	Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Law, Finance, or any field that demonstrates strong analytical and organizational capabilities. 
	Experience: 1 - 3 years of relevant experience in a fast-paced, professional environment (e.g., consulting, finance, legal, corporate operations, or equivalent high-pressure roles). 
	We value diverse academic backgrounds and perspectives. 


Skills:


	Exceptional organizational and process-management skills. 
	Strong problem-solving abilities and analytical thinking. 
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 
	High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple priorities. 


Benefits


	This is a unique opportunity to be part of a high-impact team at the heart of the business.
	The role offers exposure to strategic decision-making and the potential for career progression within the organization. 
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Accounts Officer Job at Tetra Maritime




        
    

        
        Tetra Maritime is a leading Nigerian ship owner and operator, providing comprehensive and tailor-made solutions across the oil and gas supply chain, including upstream, midstream, and downstream.

We are recruiting suitable candidates to support our Accounting Function in the capacity below:

Job Position: Accounts Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Slots: 2 Openings

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain cash & bank book, bank reconciliations
	Preparing schedules for tax returns – VAT, Withholding taxes, audit schedules
	Preparation of sales invoices, credit notes, sales summary analysis
	Updating vendor & customer accounts and reconciliations
	Sales, purchase transactions entries in the accounting system
	Bank Payments vouchers preparation
	Inter-company reconciliations
	Documents upkeeping for audits
	Aid during audits – documents readiness, schedules preparation, filing and document ownership
	Visits to bank and tax offices for compliances
	Any other jobs may get assigned as and when need arises.


Requirements


	BSc / MSc in Accounting, Computer knowledge – MS office, accounting software – Tally / Sage / SAP is must
	Work experience in any manufacturing unit / shipping agency.


Additional Information:


	The role is based in our Lagos office, 5 days per week.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Control Manager",
  "description": "CareerHive Management -&nbsp;We pride ourselves in bringing the world of work together through technology by recruiting highly qualified technical &amp; non technical talents for your brand.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Internal Control Manager to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will have practical experience in internal control processes, with the ability to identify risks, support control measures, and ensure operational compliance.
	You should have intermediate analytical skills, excellent time management, and reporting abilities.
	Retail industry experience is an added advantage.


Key Responsibilities


	Implementation and continuous improvement of internal control policies and procedures across business operations.
	Conduct regular internal control checks, audits, and reviews to ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements.
	Identify areas of process improvement and recommend corrective actions to strengthen internal control systems.
	Monitor daily operational activities and ensure proper documentation and adherence to internal control standards.
	Prepare periodic reports and presentations on internal control findings for management review.
	Perform data analysis using Excel to identify trends, discrepancies, and potential risks.
	Support investigations into operational breaches, discrepancies, or fraudulent activities.
	Collaborate with various departments to ensure smooth implementation of internal control measures.
	Participate in risk assessments and assist in the design of control measures for new processes.
	Track corrective action plans and ensure timely closure of internal control gaps.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and work experience.
	3 years &amp; Above of relevant work experience in internal control, audit, or compliance roles.
	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Intermediate analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and identify risk patterns.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel.
	Excellent time management skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail.
	Good reporting and documentation skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.
	Retail industry experience is an added advantage.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience with ERP systems (e.g., Odoo) is a plus.
	Familiarity with audit or control tools is an added benefit.


Salary
N400,000 - N500,000 / month (Based on Experience).",

Internal Control Manager Job at CareerHive Management




        
    

        
        CareerHive Management - We pride ourselves in bringing the world of work together through technology by recruiting highly qualified technical & non technical talents for your brand.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Internal Control Manager to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will have practical experience in internal control processes, with the ability to identify risks, support control measures, and ensure operational compliance.
	You should have intermediate analytical skills, excellent time management, and reporting abilities.
	Retail industry experience is an added advantage.


Key Responsibilities


	Implementation and continuous improvement of internal control policies and procedures across business operations.
	Conduct regular internal control checks, audits, and reviews to ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements.
	Identify areas of process improvement and recommend corrective actions to strengthen internal control systems.
	Monitor daily operational activities and ensure proper documentation and adherence to internal control standards.
	Prepare periodic reports and presentations on internal control findings for management review.
	Perform data analysis using Excel to identify trends, discrepancies, and potential risks.
	Support investigations into operational breaches, discrepancies, or fraudulent activities.
	Collaborate with various departments to ensure smooth implementation of internal control measures.
	Participate in risk assessments and assist in the design of control measures for new processes.
	Track corrective action plans and ensure timely closure of internal control gaps.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and work experience.
	3 years & Above of relevant work experience in internal control, audit, or compliance roles.
	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Intermediate analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and identify risk patterns.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel.
	Excellent time management skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail.
	Good reporting and documentation skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.
	Retail industry experience is an added advantage.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience with ERP systems (e.g., Odoo) is a plus.
	Familiarity with audit or control tools is an added benefit.


Salary
N400,000 - N500,000 / month (Based on Experience).
